summary: Live-applied ADR 0326 on `codex/ws-0326-live-apply` by making shard files under `workstreams/` the authored source of truth, regenerating the active-only `workstreams.yaml` compatibility surface, absorbing concurrent mainline archive shards (`ws-0332-homepage-triage` during this replay and the earlier `ws-0333-service-uptime-recovery` carry-forward), recovering the remote builder from disk exhaustion, and re-verifying the shard-backed registry through targeted tests, repository validation, regenerated manifest and diagram truth, and a passing `make remote-validate` replay while preserving the protected exact-main release surfaces for a later main integration step.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_workstream_registry.py tests/test_canonical_truth.py tests/test_workstream_surface_ownership.py tests/test_interface_contracts.py -q` returned `27 passed in 2.79s`.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces data-models generated-portals` passed on the final metadata state and exercised the shard-backed registry, ownership surfaces, schema bundle, and generated portal build without touching the protected exact-main release files.

The cleanup recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0326-build-host-workspace-cleanup-r1-0.178.1.txt` pruned 44 stale workspace roots on `docker-build-lv3`, increased free space from `108G` to `119G`, and restored the remote builder's ability to create managed workspaces.

verification.check: Generated truth refresh after first remote replay
verification.observed: The first post-rebase `make remote-validate` replay surfaced stale `build/platform-manifest.json` and `docs/diagrams/agent-coordination-map.excalidraw` outputs after the remote path recovered. `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/platform_manifest.py --write`, `python3 scripts/generate_diagrams.py --write`, and the corresponding `--check` runs refreshed both generated surfaces cleanly.

A repaired `make remote-validate` replay passed end to end against the newer `origin/main` base after the generated truth refresh, and a final replay after the receipt/workstream refresh passed again with `agent-standards`, `workstream-surfaces`, `ansible-syntax`, `schema-validation`, `atlas-lint`, `policy-validation`, `iac-policy-scan`, `alert-rule-validation`, `type-check`, and `dependency-graph` all green.

The branch rebased onto `origin/main@387dadb451507490cf584fe24af5792577bff9d2`, imported the newly merged `ws-0332-homepage-triage` archive shard, regenerated `workstreams.yaml` from shard source instead of hand-merging the generated file, and later passed verification against `origin/main@6b9117310ef45ccc8e08855f33b4ddeeb746e4ee` after `ws-0318` advanced mainline truth.

notes: This is a branch-local live-apply receipt for a repo-coordination ADR; it intentionally leaves `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, the top-level `README.md` summary, and `versions/stack.yaml` untouched on the workstream branch.

Merge-to-main still needs the protected release bookkeeping on `main`, plus the final ADR metadata promotion from `Implemented on workstream branch` to `Implemented` with the first integrated repo version.

`origin/main` advanced again to `6b9117310ef45ccc8e08855f33b4ddeeb746e4ee` during the post-rebase verification pass, so exact-main integration should begin with one fresh fetch/rebase before pushing `main`.

Because ADR 0326 changes repository coordination rather than live infrastructure state, `versions/stack.yaml` and the platform version should remain unchanged unless an exact-main integration explicitly chooses to record this repo-only truth there.
